name: podsub-link
short_description: A zero-backend tool to generate shareable podcast subscription links for all major platforms.
long_description: PodSub Links Generator is a static web application that creates shareable pages with platform-specific deep links for podcast RSS feeds. It features a dual-page architecture: a generator page where users input any podcast RSS feed URL, and a subscription landing page displaying platform buttons for Apple Podcasts, Overcast, Pocket Casts, and other services. The application includes QR code generation for easy mobile sharing, dark/light theme support, and allows configuration of custom URL schemes for unlisted podcast apps. Being pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript with no backend requirements, it can be deployed to any static hosting service.

modules.description: Generator page UI where users input podcast RSS feed URLs and receive shareable links with QR codes
Subscription landing page that displays platform-specific subscription buttons and feed details for a given RSS URL
Generator logic handling URL validation, link generation, QR code creation, and clipboard operations for the index page
Subscription page logic that generates platform buttons with deep links, manages custom URL schemes, and handles feed URL display
Shared responsive styles with dark/light theme support, component styling for buttons, inputs, and layout
Development server that serves files from src directory on a configurable port with proper MIME type handling
Production build script that minifies HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files and creates a deployable zip archive
